claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: The homepage states, "The intelligence layer you need to practice medicine the way you want," clearly outlining its value proposition.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage contains a link to the pricing page that can be accessed in two clicks.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: The documentation is accessible at https://www.suki.ai/clinicians/ without requiring a login.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Our deep, real-time integrations with the four leading EHRs — Epic, Oracle Health, athenahealth, and MEDITECH — make Suki the most embedded ambient AI solution on the market.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Our platform not only boasts a robust security posture, but is also infinitely scalable, SOC2 Type 2 certified, and HIPAA compliant to support the largest organizations in the industry.
